title: Astra Docs Search
description: A docs example wired to PageFind for client-side full-text search.
headSnippets: <meta property="og:description" content="A docs example wired to PageFind for client-side full-text search.">

<style>:root{color-scheme:light dark;--accent:#4f46e5;--border:rgba(120,120,120,0.3)}html{background:#fff;color:#111827}body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;line-height:1.6}main,.layout{max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 24px}h1{font-size:36px;letter-spacing:-0.02em;margin:0 0 16px}h2{margin-top:32px}.hero{padding:32px 0 16px;text-align:left}.hero p{font-size:18px;opacity:0.85}search-box{display:block;margin:24px 0 32px}search-box input{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;font-size:16px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:transparent;color:inherit}search-box input:focus{outline:2px solid var(--accent);outline-offset:2px}search-box .results{margin-top:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}search-box .results a{display:block;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;color:inherit;background:rgba(120,120,120,0.05)}search-box .results a:hover{background:rgba(79,70,229,0.08);border-color:var(--accent)}search-box .results .meta{display:block;font-size:13px;opacity:0.7;margin-top:2px}search-box .empty{padding:8px 4px;font-size:14px;opacity:0.6}.toc{margin:24px 0;padding:16px 20px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(120,120,120,0.04)}.toc ul{margin:8px 0 0;padding-left:20px}.toc a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}.toc a:hover{text-decoration:underline}footer{margin-top:48px;padding:24px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;opacity:0.7;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}code{background:rgba(120,120,120,0.12);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.9em}pre{background:rgba(120,120,120,0.08);padding:16px;border-radius:8px;overflow-x:auto}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){*{animation-duration:0.001s!important;transition-duration:0.001s!important}}</style>
